mapper.sql: id, type, objType, objId, field1, field2, field3, field4, field5, field6, field7, field8, field9, field10, disabled, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, customInfo
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_common_related_data (type, objType, objId, field1, field2, field3, field4, field5, field6, field7, field8, field9, field10, disabled, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, customInfo ) values (#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{objType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{objId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{field1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field6,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field7,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field8,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field9,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{field10,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON} )

mapper.update:
update pm_common_related_data
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
objType = #{objType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
objId = #{objId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
field1 = #{field1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
field2 = #{field2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
field3 = #{field3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
field4 = #{field4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
field5 = #{field5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
field6 = #{field6,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
field7 = #{field7,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
field8 = #{field8,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
field9 = #{field9,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
field10 = #{field10,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}),
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update pm_common_related_data set type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, objType = #{objType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, objId = #{objId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, field1 = #{field1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, field2 = #{field2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, field3 = #{field3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, field4 = #{field4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, field5 = #{field5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, field6 = #{field6,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, field7 = #{field7,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, field8 = #{field8,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, field9 = #{field9,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, field10 = #{field10,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}) where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

trim.if: (cr.effectiveTo is null or cr.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

if.if: (cr.effectiveTo is null or cr.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

trim.if: ( cr.type like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.objType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field1 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field2 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field3 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field4 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field5 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field6 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field7 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field8 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field9 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field10 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

mapper.select:
select * from pm_common_related_data as cr
cr.id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
cr.type = #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.objType = #{objType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.objId = #{objId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
cr.field1 = #{field1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field2 = #{field2, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field3 = #{field3, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field4 = #{field4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field5 = #{field5, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field6 = #{field6, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field7 = #{field7, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field8 = #{field8, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field9 = #{field9, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field10 = #{field10, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
cr.effectiveFrom <= #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(cr.effectiveTo is null or cr.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
cr.createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
cr.updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
cr.customInfo = #{customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND

select * from pm_common_related_data as cr
cr.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
cr.type = #{model.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.objType = #{model.objType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.objId = #{model.objId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
cr.field1 = #{model.field1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field2 = #{model.field2, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field3 = #{model.field3, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field4 = #{model.field4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field5 = #{model.field5, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field6 = #{model.field6, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field7 = #{model.field7, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field8 = #{model.field8, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field9 = #{model.field9, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.field10 = #{model.field10, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
cr.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(cr.effectiveTo is null or cr.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
cr.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
cr.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
cr.customInfo = #{model.customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
( cr.type like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.objType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field1 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field2 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field3 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field4 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field5 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field6 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field7 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field8 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field9 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.field10 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or cr.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select count(1) from pm_common_related_data as cr
cr.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
cr.type = #{model.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
cr.objType = #{model.objType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
